intro.title: Seeing a machine in action means confidence in its efficiency
intro.text: Choosing an industrial machine is a decision that impacts the entire production process. We offer visits to real workshops of our partners.

1.title: Real operating mode.
1.text: You will see how the machine works under real load.

2.title: Tests with your material.
2.text: Bring your own workpieces for testing.

3.title: Engineer dialogue.
3.text: Get answers to practical production questions.

4.title: Efficiency assessment.
4.text: Evaluate speed, accuracy, and machine resource.

5.title: Informed choice.
5.text: Make decisions based on facts, not just marketing.

storage.title: BAYMIR has the largest warehouse in Kazakhstan
storage.subTitle: Your confidence is our priority.
storage.subTitle2: Own warehouse space and stable equipment stock.

cards.1: Demonstration of equipment loading before shipment

info.title: xxxx m2 of reliable storage: equipment in stock and ready for shipment.
info.description: For metalworking businesses, an in-house equipment warehouse is a strategic asset. It helps avoid downtime caused by delivery delays and react quickly to urgent orders. BAYMIR provides access to one of the largest logistics facilities in Kazakhstan. Our warehouse is equipped with modern storage systems containing a large fleet of lathes, milling, laser, and other machines. All equipment is ready for immediate shipment.

production.title: Machine operation in real production
production.subTitle: See equipment in action before purchase.
production.text: We show machine operation at partner workshops: speed, quality, staff, and real production cycle.
production.textUnderPhoto: Photos from our partners' production workshops.

youGet.title: What will you get from visiting production?

speed.text: You will see machine performance in conditions close to yours

quality.text: Review product samples and evaluate accuracy, speed and processing

employees.text: Understand how the process is organized and how the team operates

benefits.title: Why is it useful for you?

hero.title: BAYMIR - turnkey machines and equipment
hero.description: We select equipment for your production goals: configuration, recommendations, commissioning, and long-term support. Our focus is fast payback and stable performance.

stats.title: Key facts
stats.years: years of experience in Kazakhstan and Russia
stats.warehouse: m2 of one of the largest machine warehouses

expertise.title: Deep expertise
expertise.text: We choose equipment based on your actual workshop tasks and budget, without unnecessary options.

engineers.title: Strong engineering team
engineers.text: Experienced engineers provide commissioning, training, and technical support throughout the machine lifecycle.

stock.title: Powerful warehouse resource
stock.text: A large stock in Almaty helps us ship equipment quickly and reduce downtime risks for your business.

speed.title: Fast deliveries
speed.text: Direct supplies, trusted brands, and service coverage across Kazakhstan, as well as Russia, Belarus, and Kyrgyzstan.

brands.title: Brands and geography
brands.description: BAYMIR is a premium dealer in Kazakhstan for Bodor, Krrass, LOCK, and other brands. We deliver equipment and provide full support from launch to maintenance.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.cta: Leave a request - we will select equipment for your task and budget, and calculate timelines and terms (installment/leasing).
